moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for pioneering Latin rock, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Carlos Santana! What's your go-to Santana track for a dose of pure guitar magic?

angles.name: Latin Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Celebrating Carlos Santana's 79th today! From Woodstock to 'Smooth', his sound is truly timeless. What's your favourite era of his music?

moments.title: The Open Championship concludes
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, one of golf's most prestigious majors, wrapped up yesterday with a thrilling finish at Royal Birkdale, dominating sports headlines.

angles.name: Morning After
angles.copy: Still buzzing from The Open Championship finish yesterday! Who was your standout player at Royal Birkdale?

angles.name: Major Winner
angles.copy: Another incredible Open Championship in the books! What a performance by the winner this year. Did you watch the drama unfold?

moments.title: Cat Stevens / Yusuf Islam turns 78
moments.blurb: Influential folk-rock singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, celebrates his 78th birthday tomorrow, July 21st.

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible Cat Stevens (Yusuf Islam) turns 78! Which of his classic songs always transports you?

angles.name: Folk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 78th for tomorrow to the legendary Cat Stevens! From 'Wild World' to 'Father and Son', his songwriting is pure gold.

moments.title: Don Henley, George Clinton & Rufus Wainwright birthdays
moments.blurb: Wednesday sees birthdays for Eagles' Don Henley (79), funk pioneer George Clinton (85), and acclaimed singer-songwriter Rufus Wainwright (53).

angles.name: Triple Threat
angles.copy: Big birthday shout-outs on Wednesday! Don Henley (79), George Clinton (85), and Rufus Wainwright (53) all celebrate. A true musical melting pot!

angles.name: Funk & Folk
angles.copy: Happy Birthday for Wednesday to two legends: George Clinton and Don Henley! Plus the brilliant Rufus Wainwright. Which artist are you spinning?

moments.title: WOMAD Festival kicks off
moments.blurb: The World of Music, Arts and Dance (WOMAD) Festival begins this Thursday, July 23rd, at its new home in Neston Park, Wiltshire, promising a vibrant celebration of global culture.

angles.name: Global Grooves
angles.copy: WOMAD Festival kicks off on Thursday! Who's heading to Neston Park for a weekend of incredible world music, arts, and dance?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Ready for WOMAD! The festival of global sounds and arts starts this Thursday in Wiltshire. What's on your must-see list?

moments.title: Slash of Guns N' Roses turns 61
moments.blurb: Iconic Guns N' Roses guitarist Slash, known for his distinctive riffs and top hat, celebrates his 61st birthday this Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the legendary Slash! What's your favourite Guns N' Roses guitar solo from the man in the top hat?

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: This Thursday, we're celebrating Slash's 61st birthday! The Guns N' Roses icon continues to inspire generations of guitarists.

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, celebrated for her music, acting, and dance, marks her 57th birthday this Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: Jenny From The Block
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only J.Lo this Friday! What's your ultimate Jennifer Lopez anthem?

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Jennifer Lopez's 57th on Friday! From hit songs to movie roles, she truly does it all. What's your favourite J.Lo moment?

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart Topper
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart is updated this Friday, July 24th, with speculation mounting over which artist will claim the coveted Number 1 spot with a brand new track.

angles.name: Chart Race
angles.copy: New UK Singles Chart this Friday! Who do you think is going to hit Number 1? Any predictions for the top spot?

angles.name: Friday Feeling
angles.copy: Chart update Friday! Get ready for the freshest sounds as a new Number 1 is crowned. What new music are you hoping to see climb the charts?

moments.title: Thurston Moore of Sonic Youth turns 68
moments.blurb: Thurston Moore, co-founder of influential alternative rock band Sonic Youth, celebrates his 68th birthday this Saturday, July 25th.

angles.name: Alt-Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 68th Birthday this Saturday to Thurston Moore! The Sonic Youth legend's influence on alternative music is undeniable. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Sonic Youth Sound
angles.copy: Celebrating Thurston Moore's 68th on Saturday! Co-founder of Sonic Youth, a true pioneer. What's your favourite album from the band?

moments.title: Mick Jagger of The Rolling Stones turns 83
moments.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday this Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Rock'n'Roll Legend
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday this Sunday to the one and only Mick Jagger! Still got the moves. What's your all-time favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Stones Forever
angles.copy: 83 years young! Celebrating Sir Mick Jagger's birthday this Sunday. The ultimate showman and a true rock icon. What's your favourite Rolling Stones album?

moments.title: New BBC drama 'The Silent Witness' premieres
moments.blurb: A gripping new BBC crime drama, 'The Silent Witness', is set to premiere this Wednesday, July 22nd, promising a week of intense viewing.

angles.name: Midweek Mystery
angles.copy: New BBC drama alert! 'The Silent Witness' kicks off this Wednesday. Who's ready for a new crime thriller to get stuck into?

angles.name: TV Watchlist
angles.copy: Got your popcorn ready? 'The Silent Witness' premieres on BBC this Wednesday. What are your predictions for the series?

moments.title: Kendal Calling countdown begins
moments.blurb: Kendal Calling, the popular Cumbrian music and arts festival, is just around the corner, running from July 30th to August 2nd, promising a packed weekend of live music.

angles.name: Festival Excitement
angles.copy: Counting down to Kendal Calling! The fields of Cumbria will be alive with music from July 30th. Who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Cumbria Calling
angles.copy: Just over a week until Kendal Calling kicks off! What acts are you most excited to see at Lowther Deer Park?

moments.title: UK basks in summer heat
moments.blurb: The UK is currently experiencing a warm spell, with temperatures rising across the country, making it perfect weather for summer activities and school holidays.

angles.name: Sunshine & Smiles
angles.copy: What a beautiful start to the week! The UK is enjoying some glorious summer sunshine. How are you making the most of the weather?

angles.name: Heatwave Hits
angles.copy: It's heating up across the UK! Remember to stay cool and hydrated as temperatures climb. What's your favourite way to beat the heat?
